decisions.briefing: Markets drifted slightly lower today with NASDAQ off 0.4% and S&P 500 down 0.1% — a neutral, low-conviction session with no strong directional signal. Despite 4 open portfolio slots and a compelling lineup of momentum candidates (FBIN at score 100, plus eight names at 95), available cash of $477 falls just below the $500 deployment threshold, leaving us unable to act. No trades today; the priority is letting existing positions play out and recycling capital when auto-sells trigger.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted a quiet, slightly negative session today, with the NASDAQ declining 0.4% and the S&P 500 slipping 0.1% — neither a decisive risk-off move nor a continuation of recent bullish momentum. The flat price action reflects broad consolidation as investors digest recent gains without a clear new catalyst. Sector rotation appeared muted, with no single theme dominating the tape.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日走勢平靜，小幅收跌，那斯達克下跌0.4%，標普500指數微跌0.1%，市場未能延續近期升勢，亦未出現明顯的避險情緒。整體走勢反映投資者在缺乏新催化劑的情況下，正消化近期漲幅，進入整固階段。各板塊輪動跡象不明顯，市場缺乏主線主題驅動。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag is what happens when idle cash in your portfolio earns little to nothing while market opportunities pass by. Today, even though we have 4 open slots and high-scoring stocks like FBIN ready to deploy into, our $477 cash balance sits just below the $500 minimum needed to open a new position — so we're locked out. The fix is proactive capital recycling: trimming underperformers or taking profits before cash runs dry so you're always ready to act.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 現金拖累（Cash Drag）是指投資組合中閒置的現金因收益極低，導致整體回報被拖低的現象。今日，儘管組合有4個空缺槽位，且FBIN等高評分股票提供了明確的進場機會，但可用現金僅剩477美元，低於建倉所需的500美元門檻，令我們無法行動。解決之道在於主動管理資金循環——適時止盈或汰弱，確保現金隨時充裕，把握市場機會。
